DARV.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-0.a: Oh, Miss, you have a very beautiful sword. I think you wouldn't mind having another one.
DARV.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-1.c: No need, let me see if there are any other options.
What do you want this time? I think nothing is more precious than your sword.
DARV.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.2-0.c: Do you have any [jitter]memories[/jitter] collected here?
DARV.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.2-1.a: Hmm... Actually, I haven't. Perhaps I should try to gather some. [i][font_size=22]Darv looks gloomy[/font_size][/i]
NEOW.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-0.c: Is this where... my memory has been devoured again? [i][font_size=22]Ye Shunguang covers his forehead[/font_size][/i]
NEOW.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.1-1.c: I have gained some insights, but I still need to recall more.
NEOW.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.2-0.c: Zhe... Ling... Brother... Everyone from Yunkui Summit ..
What a beautiful little girl! I have many beautiful accessories here, and they will definitely suit you well.

Here, put on this, this, and this. 
Hmm, they all fit well, but you can only choose one to take away.
I greatly admire your magnificent swordsmanship, and you deserve my blessing.
OROBAS.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-0: Oh! An interdimensional traveler! Let me take a look!.
OROBAS.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-1: Interdimensional... Traveler? Do you know the way back for me?
OROBAS.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-2: I don't know! I want to know! Hurry up and find the answer!!
OROBAS.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.1-0: A glowing sword! Why is it glowing!?
OROBAS.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.1-1: I'm sorry, I can't pull it out for you to see right now.
OROBAS.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.2-1: I'm really sorry, my memory has been partially erased by [jitter].
PAEL.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-0.a: [thinky_dots]Take a piece of me, it will help you retrieve your memories.[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Perhaps you should also take a nap, which can help restore your memory.[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.2-0.a: [thinky_dots]What memories are you searching for? Perhaps my father might know. Go and find him.[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.0-0.a: [b]Your sword is very powerful. Take this sword and become even stronger![/b]
TANX.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.1-0.a: [b]You can conjure up so many swords! Let me have a taste of your skills![/b]
TANX.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.2-0.a: [b]Your sword technique is very sharp! Let me help you become stronger![/b]
Little girl, come in quickly. Are you going to the top floor? There's a bad guy there. You must [jitter][b] strike first to gain the upper hand![/b][/jitter].
Do you want to try again? I'll help you.
What memories are you seeking? Perhaps I can assist you.
I don't know either, but it must be very important.
Trading five senses for strength? This sword is simply amazing!
Isn't it good to forget everything? By doing so, you will gain immense power.
Some things... absolutely cannot be forgotten.
Make a contract with me, and I will bestow upon you [jitter][b]a power greater than that of the Qingming Sword.[/b][/jitter]
Having the Qingming Sword is already more than enough for me.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGU: Can you help me retrieve my memory?
What are you talking about? A novel plot?.
Why are you here again? Didn't you hear what I said?
Why did you travel across other worlds to come here?
I'm also looking for a way to go back. Can you help me?
